description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a robust wooden stock and fore-end, paired with a matte black metal receiver and barrel. The barrel is medium in length and includes a ventilated rib along the top, likely for improved sighting and heat dissipation. The wooden stock is full-sized, with a straight comb and a slightly angled butt, providing stability and comfort for the user. The fore-end is also wooden and ribbed for grip, indicating its function as a pump mechanism. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing a single trigger. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible screws and mechanical details, suggesting durability and practical use in urban environments.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a wooden stock and fore-end, matte black metal barrel, and a ventilated rib. The design is sturdy and practical, with a rounded trigger guard and visible pump mechanism.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden stock, fore-end, and the length of the black barrel with a ventilated rib.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, ribbed fore-end, and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, fore-end, and the full length of the barrel with visible ribbing.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the flat butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges
